chunks.content: Document 4 chunk 0: DevOps practices bridge the gap between development and operations teams.
Document 4 chunk 1: Version control systems track changes to source code over time.
Document 4 chunk 2: Automated testing frameworks validate software behavior against requirements.
Document 4 chunk 3: Configuration management tools maintain consistent system environments.
Document 4 chunk 4: Release management processes coordinate software deployment schedules.
Document 4 chunk 5: Service level agreements define expected system uptime and performance.
Document 4 chunk 6: Agile methodologies promote iterative development and frequent delivery.
Document 4 chunk 7: Code review practices improve quality and knowledge sharing among teams.
Document 4 chunk 8: Performance profiling identifies bottlenecks in application execution paths.
Document 4 chunk 9: Technical debt management balances short-term speed with long-term quality.
